mapper.update: update kb_model_label set is_deleted = #{kbModelLabelEntity.isDeleted} where id = #{kbModelLabelEntity.id}
update kb_model_label set is_deleted = 3 where id=#{id}
mapper.select:
SELECT t.* FROM kb_model_label t WHERE 1 = 1
AND t.id like concat('%',#{kbModelLabelEntity.id},'%')
AND t.name like concat('%',#{kbModelLabelEntity.name},'%')
AND t.browsing_times like concat('%',#{kbModelLabelEntity.browsingTimes},'%')
AND t.status like concat('%',#{kbModelLabelEntity.status},'%')
AND t.sort like concat('%',#{kbModelLabelEntity.sort},'%')
limit #{map.offset},#{map.rows}

select kml.*, count(l_id) as alls FROM kb_model_label kml LEFT JOIN kb_basic_label kbl ON kml.id = kbl.l_id WHERE kml.hot_word = 1 and kml.is_deleted = 2 GROUP BY kml.id ORDER BY sort desc, alls desc, create_time desc LIMIT 10
select label.name from kb_model_label label join kb_basic_label bi on bi.l_id = label.id where label.is_deleted = 2 and b_id =#{bid}

select label.*, case when lb.count is null then 0 else lb.count end as count from kb_model_label label left join (select l_id, count(1) as count from kb_basic_label group by l_id) lb on lb.l_id = label.id
label.is_deleted = 2
and label.status = #{kbModelLabelDto.status} and label.is_deleted = 2
and label.is_deleted = 1
and label.name like concat('%',#{kbModelLabelDto.name},'%')
order by lb.count desc,label.create_time desc
limit #{map.offset},#{map.rows}

select count(1) from( select label.*, case when lb.count is null then 0 else lb.count end as count from kb_model_label label left join (select l_id, count(1) as count from kb_basic_label group by l_id) lb on lb.l_id = label.id
label.is_deleted = 2
and label.status = #{kbModelLabelDto.status} and label.is_deleted = 2
and label.is_deleted = 1
and label.name like concat('%',#{kbModelLabelDto.name},'%')
) t1

select * from kb_model_label where is_deleted = 1
limit #{map.offset},#{map.rows}
select count(1) from kb_model_label where is_deleted = 1
